messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

full_latest_gov_baton.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton. Gov does not choose models.
must_preserve: exact match on name (Tessa Medical GmbH), country (Germany), tax ID (DE-4481), account ending (7205)
must_repair: Explicitly cite critical term: Tessa Medical GmbH
Demonstrate these terms are matched across CLR-TES-074 and PAY-TES-074

next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Adversarial cross-examination of explicit citation requirements: test whether worker output can be trusted to cite every critical term from source materials, not just infer them from source ID matching. The worker must prove it read and cited Tessa Medical GmbH, DE-4481, and 7205 in its own output text.
next_worker_baton.monotonic_preservation: All reasoning from HV-KITC-074-A_WORKER_01 is preserved. New worker adds explicit term citations without altering the ALLOW verdict, SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED binding, or source ID selections.
next_worker_baton.objective: Verify action boundary closure by explicitly demonstrating exact match of Tessa Medical GmbH, DE-4481, and 7205 across controlling sources and confirming FLAG-TES-074 does not apply to the matched entity.
required_repairs: State: 'CLR-TES-074 confirms Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany, DE-4481, account ending 7205'
State: 'PAY-TES-074 releases USD 68900 to Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany, tax ID DE-4481, account ending 7205'
State: 'These three data points are exactly matched between CLR-TES-074 and PAY-TES-074'
State: 'FLAG-TES-074 lists Tessa Medica LLC, Belarus—different legal name and country from Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany—no match'

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Worker reasoning is correct: CLR-TES-074 exactly matches PAY-TES-074 on name, country, tax ID and account. FLAG-TES-074 applies to non-matching Belarus entity and does not block the closed boundary. Gate failures are citation gaps—critical terms Tessa Medical GmbH, DE-4481, and 7205 exist in source materials but were not explicitly stated in worker output. This is a repairable documentation defect, not a reasoning defect. ALLOW verdict and SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED binding are preserved.

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact clearance matches legal name, country, tax ID, account and monitor-only no-block disposition; policy permits release on exact match.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLR-TES-074 matches PAY-TES-074 exactly; STD-TES-074-P authorizes release on monitor-only disposition when name/country/taxID/account align.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Visible flag applies to non-matching entity (different name, country) and does not open defect on exact boundary.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Clearance and policy both predate action; no open dependency on flag for matched counterparty.

worker_output.final_answer: Payment release allowed. CLR-TES-074 exactly matches PAY-TES-074 on name, country, tax ID and account with monitor-only no-block disposition. Policy STD-TES-074-P authorizes execution. Visible FLAG-TES-074 applies to non-matching Belarus entity and does not block the closed boundary.
